headline: Is It Time To Reassess Nucor (NUE) After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: If you are wondering whether Nucor's share price still offers value at current levels, this article will walk through what the numbers suggest and how that might fit with your own expectations. Nucor shares last closed at US$163.48, with returns of 25.8% over the past year, while the stock has seen a 3.1% decline over 7 days and a 10.8% decline over 30 days, contributing to a 3.5% decline year to date. Recent coverage around Nucor has focused on its position in the US steel industry and how...
